name: I-Perimortem Cesarean Section (PMCS)
description: Unikezelo lotyando olungxamisekileyo phakathi kwemizuzu emi-4 yokubanjwa kwentliziyo kamama ukuvumela iCPR esebenzayo kunye nokusinda komntwana osanda kuzalwa. Isibeleko sicinezela i-aorta kunye ne-IVC -- unikezelo luphinda luvuselele umama.
steps: Yenza umgca ophakathi othe nkqo ukusuka kwi-umbilicus ukuya kwi-pubis ngokusebenzisa ulusu kunye ne-fascia.
Gcoba inxalenye yesibeleko esisezantsi ngokuthe tye.
Sandisa usana kumboneleli wesibini kumboneleli-nkonzo wovuselelo lwemveku.
Pakisha isibeleko kunye nesisu ukuba ukuvala ngokuqinisekileyo akunakwenzeka ngokukhawuleza.
Qhubeka nokuvuselela umama -- i-ROSC inokwenzeka ngakumbi emva kokunyanzeliswa kwesibeleko.
warnings: Ixesha lesigqibo sokubeleka kufuneka libe ngaphantsi kwemizuzu emi-5 ngezona ziphumo zingcono zikamama kunye nosana olungekazalwa.
Le nkqubo licebo lokugqibela -- kuphela ukuba umama ubanjwe yintliziyo kwaye ukubeleka sekusondele (>iiveki ezingama-20 zokumitha).
Ifuna uqeqesho lwenqanaba lobugqirha. Amayeza okulwa kufuneka alungiselele intsimi kunye nenkxaso, angenzi ngokuzimeleyo.
source: JTS Obstetric CPG / ACOG Emergency Guidelines
